## Final review

- [ ] The full diff was reviewed.
- [ ] Temporary files, debug output, and accidental changes were removed.
- [ ] New pages and resources are linked from the existing experience.
- [ ] No placeholder content, fake tools, or unfinished interfaces were added.
- [ ] Relevant tests and checks pass, or failures are documented accurately.
- [ ] The branch targets the current default branch.
